title: Trachette Jackson Fights Cancer With Math
summary: Quantitative models built by the mathematical biologist Trachette Jackson can make cancer therapies safer and more effective. The post Trachette Jackson Fights Cancer With Math first appeared on Quanta Magazine
content:
Quantitative models built by the mathematical biologist Trachette Jackson can make cancer therapies safer and more effective.
